case_title: ROBERT KENNEDY VS. THE CREME BRULEE CART LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT THE CREME BRULEE CART LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CREME BRULEE CART LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $2,759.83 PRINCIPAL, $9.68 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,994.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
